author: developeruche
content:
I completely agree with the Hive dashboard approach. Having a public dashboard and using this to tryout the `newPayloadWithWitness` proposal on other client is a nice move.

I am interested, could help out hook up the Ethrex-PoC. thanks for looping me in 🙏 

_side note_: After the RPC call yesterday, I added this proposal to the ACDE call scheduled for Thursday
